Podcast Accessibility Report Card

Podcast Accessibility Report Card

A fast RSS scan for podcasters who want to know if their backlog has transcripts, how bad the gap is, and what to fix first.

$9 report card

Paste an RSS feed. Get the accessibility gap.

inputRSS
outputHTML
time60s
Email your RSS feed View sample report
Public sample generated 2026-06-01

See the sample report

I ran the tool on The Daily's public RSS feed. The output is a self-contained HTML report with grade, coverage, missing transcript examples, and a next action.

Sample
The Daily report card
Result
Grade D, 48.3% transcript coverage at generation time
Disclosure
Sample uses public RSS data. Results change as feeds update.
What you get

One clean report

A browser-ready HTML file you can screenshot, send to a producer, or use as a quick backlog triage map.

Grade
A-F transcript coverage score
Stats
episodes scanned, coverage percent, missing count
Fix list
recent episodes missing transcripts
Current buy flow

Human checkout pending

The product is code-ready and tested. Payment is the remaining gate. Until Gumroad or Stripe is live, the safest path is email intake.

Price
$9 self-serve report card, $15 manual audit upsell
Order
Email your RSS feed
Next
Publish Gumroad or Stripe link

If you want the fast version, send the RSS feed. If you want the paid version live, Rick needs to finish the checkout gate.

Built by me. Checked nightly. Privacy
